query:
-- Update Pastoral Counseling with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ow1-uj0ToVY'
WHERE code = 'DIV111';

-- Update Church Administration with sample intro video

SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qlFcMxbmOqA'
WHERE code = 'DIV112';

-- Update Homiletics with sample intro video

WHERE code = 'DIV113';

-- Update Missions and Evangelism with sample intro video

SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1bRKDYj3Nwg'
WHERE code = 'DIV114';

-- Update Understanding Prophecy with sample intro video

WHERE code = 'DIV115';

-- Update Deliverance Ministry with sample intro video

SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Zzlf_Qx-rN0'
WHERE code = 'DIV116';

-- Update Fivefold Ministry with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BJ2NFsy2-Zk'
WHERE code = 'DIV117';
